mapper.select: select * from appreciation_comment where schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and member_id = #{memberId} limit 1

select e.*, c.course_name, u.real_name as member_name from appreciation_comment e left join repertoire_info c on e.course_id = c.id left join sys_user u on e.member_id = u.id where e.artist_id = #{artistId} order by e.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into appreciation_comment (schedule_id, course_id, member_id, artist_id, evaluation_score, evaluation_content) values (#{scheduleId}, #{courseId}, #{memberId}, #{artistId}, #{evaluationScore}, #{evaluationContent})
